creator: nick@van-laarhoven.org
text:
x11-fonts/mozilla-fonts/pkg-descr references /usr/X11R6 which is outdated.
It should perhaps be more appropriately referencing %%PREFIX%% (%%LOCALBASE%%
?) instead.

Fix: 

Probably other ports need to be updated. Perhaps a 

	grep -r '/usr/X11R6' /usr/ports 2> /dev/null | less

is in order to fix all the locations where this change has not been done yet.
